title: Qubit Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Cross-chain collateralization exploit using a logic bug in the deposit function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls QBridge deposit function with tokenAddress set to 0x0

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls QBridge deposit function with tokenAddress set to 0x0
summary: The attacker exploited a logic bug in Qubit Finance's deposit function, allowing them to use cross-chain collateralization without locking ETH. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for calls to the deposit function with a zero tokenAddress.
